title: Cozy Tide
description:
Cozy Tide is a cozy fishing, collecting, and island-building game about starting with almost nothing and slowly turning a tiny patch of ocean into a cheerful little harbor home.

Cast your line, wait for the bobber to dip, fight the fish, gather resources, expand your island, place buildings, unlock upgrades, and collect decorations. Some fish are common. Some are rare. Some should probably not be in the water.

Build up your island at your own pace. Add useful buildings like the Shop Tent, Cozy Tent, Workshop, Harbor, Campfire, Fish Traps, and more. Each building helps your island grow, gives you new goals, or makes your fishing routine smoother.

As you play, your little island becomes easier to manage. Earn coins, gather wood and stone, improve your fishing power, unlock passive systems, complete daily goals, and keep filling out your collection logs one catch at a time.

When you want something different, set sail on Daily Voyages: short challenge islands with special rules, strange weather, score targets, and bonus rewards. Chase perfect runs, collect voyage rewards, and return home with new stories from the sea.

You can also create Postcard Islands: small decorative islands where you place tiles, decorations, trees, rocks, props, and cozy details to make your own tiny ocean diorama. Build something cute, weird, organized, chaotic, or all of the above.

Features:

• Active cozy fishing with timing, fish fights, rare catches, size records, and collection goals

• Island expansion, buildings, upgrades, passive systems, and resource gathering

• Hundreds of fish to discover across zones, weather, times of day, and special conditions

• Daily quests, Fish of the Day, rotating shop stock, and short-term goals

• Daily Voyage challenge islands with special mutators and rewards

• Postcard Island decorating with tiles, props, ambient settings, and cozy customization

• Character cosmetics, including outfits, hats, rods, and bobbers

• Boss fish, trophies, secrets, achievements, and long-term collection progress

• A relaxed pace with steady progression and plenty of small goals

Cozy Tide is designed for players who enjoy fishing games, collection logs, incremental progression, decorating, tiny islands, daily challenges, and games that let you make progress without rushing.
description_short: A cozy fishing and island-building game where you catch strange fish, expand your tiny island, decorate postcard islands, complete daily voyages, and collect your way through a cheerful ocean world.
